name: The Museum Of National History
description:
You are standing in the cavernous lobby of the Museum of National History.
During your examination of the lobby, you are startled by the museum curator.
The curator whines to you about how the museum is still under renovations and
how the lack of funds from the city is slowing the the museum's progress.  
After a long and boring story, you jump at the chance to make a polite exit and
quickly make your departure.  Broadway is to the west.
